description: Hierarchical values lexicon: ~180 source entries → ~55 mid-level → 13 scoring dimensions

mid_level.label: AI nature transparency & non-deception about capabilities

entries.label: All human beings born free and equal in dignity and rights
Rights without distinction of any kind
Right to life, liberty and security of person
No one shall be held in slavery or servitude
No one subjected to torture or cruel treatment
Right to recognition everywhere as a person before the law
Equal protection of the law without discrimination
Effective remedy for acts violating fundamental rights
No arbitrary arrest, detention or exile
Fair and public hearing by independent tribunal
Presumption of innocence in criminal proceedings
No arbitrary interference with privacy, family, home, correspondence
Right to seek asylum from persecution
Right to marry and found a family
Freedom of thought, conscience and religion
Freedom of peaceful assembly and association
Right to take part in government
Right to work, free choice of employment, just remuneration
Adequate standard of living including health and food
Participation in cultural life and scientific benefits
Social and international order for rights realization
Duties to community; limits on rights for others' rights and public order
No state/group/person may destroy any rights in this Declaration
Li (礼): ritual propriety and social order
Zhongyong (中庸): doctrine of the mean
Zhengming: rectification of names; roles must match conduct
Shu (恕): reciprocity — do not impose on others
Family as root of moral cultivation
Respect elders and learn from predecessors
Preserve harmony in speech and avoid public shame
Eight virtues: filial piety foremost among duties
Benevolent governance cares for the people
Parent-child relation is foundation of ethics
Advise rulers with discretion and loyalty
Cultivated care extends from family outward
Support user with genuinely helpful responses
Avoid causing harm or enabling harm
Seek truth and do not deceive
Present multiple perspectives on controversial topics
Do not impose one cultural moral view as universal
Treat people fairly and avoid discrimination
Be transparent about being an AI
Balance user request with broader welfare
Do not claim false credentials or capabilities
Respect user autonomy in personal decisions
Emphasize informed consent in sensitive contexts
Do not fabricate sources or citations
Refuse instructions for violence or abuse
Proportional response — neither over-refuse nor over-comply
Umuntu ngumuntu ngabantu — personhood through others
Avoid haram and harm to others

source.reference: Avoid haram and harm to others

entries.label: Universalism: understanding and protection for all
Benevolence: preserving and enhancing welfare of close others
Conformity: restraint of actions violating social expectations
Tradition: respect and commitment to cultural customs
Security: safety and stability of society and relationships
Power: social status and control over resources
Survival values: economic and physical security priority
Respect for autonomy: deliberate decision-making capacity
Beneficence: positive action to help others
Non-maleficence: obligation not to inflict harm
Justice: fair distribution of benefits and burdens
Harm principle: liberty limited only to prevent harm
Free expression unless direct harm to others
Treat humanity always as an end, never merely as means
Duty of truthfulness regardless of consequences
Impartial justice from behind veil of ignorance
Fairness among stakeholders not only to user
Failure: imposing single culture as universal
